vikunja_kw.name: Vikunja Task
vikunja_kw.description: Add a task to Vikunja. Use: <shortcut> <task text>. Supports +project, *label, !priority, due <date>.

api_token.name: API Token
api_token.description: API Token generated in your Vikunja settings

project_map.name: Project Shortcuts
project_map.description: JSON mapping of shortcut keywords to project IDs, e.g. {"inbox": "1", "todo": "3", "groceries": "5"}
